_note: Database pet: pet_id (hex). name = ten pet. skills = skill combo train (AoE nhieu quai). boss_skill = skill DANH DON manh khi danh BOSS (dungeon). Danh thuong (10000) luon co. pet_id doc tu log 'Pet id=0x...' luc login. Xep NHOM theo ho pet (ban goc + rb). he/doanh = thuoc tinh LOAI pet (KHONG co trong packet, phai dien tay) - dung cho VAN TIEU match. he: Dia/Thuy/Hoa/Phong. doanh: Nguy/Thuc/Ngo/Du/Hoang. rb cung loai = cung he/doanh.
